## Summary
- What changed and why.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criteria from queue/task are met.

## Files Changed
- List key files and rationale.

## Validation Evidence
- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make fmt-check`
- [ ] `make typecheck`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make queue:validate` (if queue/docs changed)
- [ ] `make docs:check` (if docs changed)

## Risks / Follow-ups
- Known risks, edge cases, and follow-up tasks.
